name: Saute'd Celery
recipeInstructions:
1 Wash and separate celery. Cut cross-wise at a slant, about 2 inches long, 1/4 inch thick.
2 In a large skillet heat oil; add onions and cook until soft.
3 Add celery and cook for 2 more minutes, stirring constantly.
4 Turn down the heat.
5 Add water and bouillon cube; salt to taste. Cook covered for 10 minutes.
